page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.32xlarge is a high-capacity storage and memory-optimized server instance. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 6763P-C processor operating at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz. The architecture is x86_64, featuring 128 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core configuration, resulting in 128 vCPUs.

The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. A key hardware feature is the integration of 61435 GB of local SSD storage, offering massive capacity for data-intensive operations. Additionally, the network interface supports a baseline bandwidth of 320 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

Given the high density of local SSD storage and substantial memory allocation, this instance provides high resource density for workloads requiring massive local storage and high-speed I/O. It is designed for large-scale databases, big data analytics, distributed file systems, and enterprise applications that demand high-throughput storage and significant memory capacity without requiring GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.32xlarge is a storage and memory-optimized server instance designed for data-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6763P-C x86_64 processor running at 2.9 GHz, it features 128 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, providing 128 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB of memory per core, alongside a massive 61435 GB of local SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 320 Gbps. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is highly optimized for workloads requiring massive local storage capacity and high-throughput data processing. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, distributed file systems, big data analytics, and high-performance storage applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.32xlarge is a storage-optimized instance featuring 128 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, 61435 GB of local SSD storage, and 320 Gbps network bandwidth for data-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity storage and memory-optimized instance featuring massive local SSD storage and high-bandwidth networking for data-intensive enterprise workloads.
